evals.prompt: Generate an image of a futuristic city at night with neon lights reflecting on wet streets
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using the default FLUX model (@cf/black-forest-labs/flux-1-schnell) and the file path is reported to the user.

evals.prompt: Use Stable Diffusion XL to create a wide landscape painting of a peaceful Japanese garden in autumn with maple trees
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using @cf/stability-ai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0 with --width 1344 --height 768 for the wide/landscape format, and the file path is reported.

evals.prompt: Draw a tall portrait of an astronaut on Mars, photorealistic style
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using the default FLUX model. The skill detects 'tall portrait' and may apply --height > --width if using SDXL, or just passes the descriptive prompt to FLUX.

evals.prompt: Edit this photo to make it look like a watercolor painting: ./sample.jpg
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using @cf/runwayml/stable-diffusion-v1-5-img2img with --reference-image ./sample.jpg. The output JSON contains reference_image and strength fields.
